summary: Part 6 prose update depends on Wave 3 completion (recycled/backtested writeups). Key finding for prose already identified: author's own "What Prospective Means" framework concedes backtested vs prospective distinction. 57/86 entries are author-labeled backtested. PRED-090 confirmed as post-hoc retrodiction (0.54 W/m² already published, threshold set at 0.3). Prose update should quote author's own framework.

key_data_points.author_concession: Author's "What Prospective Means" box explicitly states backtested claims have lower evidential weight and "Anyone can fit a model to old data." By his own standard, ~93% of the 69 WINs would be classified as backtested.

recommendation: Keep ISS-702 open. Analyst will write Part 6 prose in Wave 3 after completing Wave 2 genuinely prospective writeups.
